Idioma: Inglês · 中文 · Português

← Voltar à visão geral do RFP P6

Integração terceirizada e do local (Jiangxi)

Subpáginas

None — single página.

Introdução

This section is a concluir. Compatibility with existing equipment, JX line provider, interfaces.

Discussão

Âmbito

  • Compatible with existing third-party equipment
  • Jiangxi: Kaiyi or similar orange juicing line provider (line build + training)
  • Equipment context: JBT Marel–style citrus processing; feed lines in China → assume interface with Chinese equipment

Interfaces

  • Oranges in from their lines
  • Peels out via their augers
  • Juice to tanks/pumps

Estado

Interface points and JX scope TBD.

Figuras recomendadas (clareza para o contratado)

  • Adicionar figura: Upstream feed interface — orange infeed height/width vs P6 tubos de entrada.
  • Adicionar figura: Peel + core outfeed — auger mate to JX line hardware.
  • Adicionar figura: Juice + utilities — tank/pump connection example at P6 boundary.
